title: Conflicting Narratives
description: Participants encounter competing interpretations that require collaborative synthesis and evidence re-evaluation.

facilitatorGuidance.openingPrompt: What evidence appears to conflict, and how might your group interpret those differences?
facilitatorGuidance.stallPrompt: What earlier assumption may need to be reconsidered?
facilitatorGuidance.reflectionPrompt: How did disagreement influence your group's reasoning process?
